response.justification: The candidate lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role. While demonstrating strong software engineering fundamentals and excellent communication skills, their C++ experience is dated (2009-2015) with no recent work in the language, their recent 10-year career focuses on web development with TypeScript/Node.js, and they have zero capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income domain experience. No SQL Server or Oracle expertise is evident.
strengths: Excellent communication and mentoring skills demonstrated through multiple conference talks, workshops, and open-source contributions
Strong fundamentals in low-latency systems and performance optimization from data-integration and high-throughput background
Proven ability to work across diverse technology stacks and domains, suggesting learning capability
concerns: C++ experience is 10+ years old (2009-2015); entire recent career is web-focused TypeScript/Node.js development, not systems-level C++
No demonstrated expertise with SQL Server, Oracle, or any capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income financial systems
Career trajectory shows generalist full-stack web developer rather than systems developer with Windows platform and financial services background

key_factors.factor: Recent C++ Windows systems development experience
Capital markets or fixed-income domain knowledge
